title: oldenlandia loganioides
intro: Oldenlandia loganioides, also known as Lagurus, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia loganioides is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
